---
title: "frequency"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{frequency}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Setup

```{r Setup}
library(tidyverse)
getwd()
proj_get()
```

## Load Data

```{r Load Data}
df <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(
  normalizePath("../data-raw/vgs-export.xlsx"),
  sheet = "Frequency (by quadrat)")

print(df)
```

## Wrangle

```{r label = print column names}
colnames(df)
```


```{r remove columns}
df <- df %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Allotment = 
                   stringr::str_split(
                     Ancestry, " > ")[[1]][1],
                Pasture = 
                   stringr::str_split(
                     Ancestry, " > ")[[1]][2])
```


```{r}

```

## Plot

```{r Plot}

```


```{r setup}
library(grazeR)
```
